name: San Francisco Honey and Spice Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 1 tbsp Instant freeze-dried coffee, dissolved in
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, beat the cream cheese and honey until very smooth.
2. Add eggs and vanilla extract; continue beating until smooth.
3. Mix in flour, cornstarch, heavy cream, ground cloves, allspice, and coffee paste.
4. Beat until well combined.
5. Pour batter into a well-buttered 9-inch springform pan.
6. Bake at 325°F (160°C) for 1 hour.
7. Turn off the oven; let cake sit in closed oven for 20 minutes.
8. Transfer to a wire rack and allow to cool completely.
9. Remove sides of the springform pan; transfer cake to serving dish.
10. If desired, top with powdered sugar or whipped cream before serving.
